About Me

The designer &
developer behind
Jay's Creation

5+
Years of craft
Jayy Adeniran

A passion for creating
exceptional digital work

Hi, I'm Jayy — the creative mind and technical force behind Jay's Creation. Based in Lagos, Nigeria, I'm a web designer and developer with over 5 years of experience transforming ideas into stunning, results-driven digital experiences.

My journey began with a simple curiosity about how websites worked. That curiosity grew into passion — and passion became craft. Today, I combine strategic thinking with meticulous design and clean code to build digital products that truly stand out.

My Approach

How great work gets made

01
Discovery & Brief

I start by deeply understanding your business, audience, and goals. Vision, competitors, and success metrics all aligned — this foundation shapes every decision.

02
Strategy & Wireframing

With a clear brief, I map out information architecture and user flows. Low-fidelity wireframes refined with your feedback before any visual design begins.

03
Visual Design

High-fidelity designs with meticulous attention to typography, spacing, color, and interaction. Interactive prototypes let you experience the design before code is written.

04
Development

Clean, semantic, performant code. Built with modern technologies, fully mobile-responsive, optimized for speed and SEO from day one.

05
Launch & Support

Thorough testing, deployment, and post-launch monitoring. Ongoing support, updates, and optimization always available — I don't disappear after launch.

Services

Premium services
built for
real impact

What I Offer

Every service delivered with
craft, precision & care.

From concept to launch, every aspect of your digital presence handled with meticulous attention to detail and a relentless focus on results.

01
Web Design

Visually stunning, conversion-focused websites designed to make a lasting first impression. Every layout crafted for your specific audience.

  • Custom design from scratch
  • Mobile-first responsive layouts
  • Interactive Figma prototypes
  • Brand-aligned visual systems
02
Web Development

Clean, scalable, and blazing-fast code. From landing pages to complex web apps built with modern technologies and best practices.

  • React, Next.js, vanilla JS
  • Performance & SEO optimization
  • CMS integration
  • API & third-party integrations
03
UI/UX Design

User-centered design that feels intuitive and delightful. Interfaces that guide users effortlessly toward your business goals.

  • User research & personas
  • Wireframes & prototypes
  • Design systems
  • Accessibility (WCAG)
04
Brand Identity

From logo design to full visual identity systems — communicating your brand's essence with clarity and sophistication.

  • Logo design & variations
  • Color palette & typography
  • Brand guidelines document
  • Social media assets
05
E-Commerce

High-converting online stores on Shopify or WooCommerce. Beautiful design meets strategic UX to maximize your revenue.

  • Shopify & WooCommerce
  • Product page optimization
  • Checkout flow design
  • Payment gateway setup
06
Maintenance & Support

Ongoing support, updates, and performance optimization to keep your website running flawlessly — peace of mind, always.

  • Monthly maintenance plans
  • Security updates & backups
  • Performance monitoring
  • Priority support
